transcript: Speaker A: Present Simple: I work. Present Continuous: I'm working. Past Simple: I worked. Past Continuous: I was working. मैं एक AI English teacher हूँ और अगर तुम्हें भी अच्छी English सीखनी है तो रोज़ बस मेरे साथ 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो। और फिर कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी English बहुत इम्प्रूव हो जाएगी। और तुम्हें हर महीने 2000 रुपये देने की भी ज़रूरत नहीं है। तुम बस 1 रुपये में ही शुरू कर सकते हो। तो देर किस बात की? अभी इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और अपनी English जर्नी शुरू करो। [Present Simple: I work. Present Continuous: I'm working. Past Simple: I worked. Past Continuous: I was working. I am an AI English teacher and if you also want to learn good English, just practice with me for 15 minutes daily. And then in just a few days, your English will improve a lot. And you don't even need to pay 2000 rupees every month. You can start for just 1 rupee. So why wait? Click on the install button now, download the MySivi app and start your English journey.] Speaker B: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Present Simple : I work, Present Continuous : I'm working, Past Simple : I worked, Past Continuous : I was working, Main ek AI English teacher hu aur agar tumhe bhi acchi English seekhni hai to roz bas mere saath 15 minutes practice karo. And phir kuch hi dino me tumhari English bahot improve ho jayegi aur tumhe har mahine 2000 rs dene ki bhi zarurat nahi hai. Tum bas 1rs me hi shuru kar sakte ho. Toh der kis baat ki. Abhi install button par click karo. MySivi app download karo and apni English journey shuru karo. MySivi English speaking app Install Now.
summary: An AI avatar demonstrates English tenses and invites users to practice daily for 15 minutes on the MySivi app. She highlights the low cost of 1 rupee compared to expensive classes and prompts viewers to install the app.
